site.name: Know Your Republic
site.tagline: Who governs you, what the laws are, and what rights you hold.
site.description: A civic reference directory for India. Every fact carries a link to its official source.

home.heading: Know Your Republic
home.intro: A reference directory of the people who govern India, the laws in force, and the rights every citizen holds. Every explained fact links to its official source.

people.title: People & Government
people.description: Every public servant from your ward to the Union government — their role, responsibilities, contact, and the laws they sponsored.
people.searchLabel: Search for a representative, minister, or judge

laws.title: Laws
laws.description: Central and state bills and Acts, each with a plain-language explanation and a link to the official text.

rights.title: Rights
rights.description: Every right a citizen holds, explained in full, with its constitutional or statutory citation.

locality.heading: Start from where you live
locality.description: Enter an address or PIN code to see every representative responsible for your area — from your ward to the Union government.
locality.label: Address or PIN code
locality.comingSoon: Area lookup is not available yet.

people.title: People & Government
people.description: Public servants from local bodies to the Union government.

laws.title: Laws
laws.description: Bills and Acts of the Union and the states.

rights.title: Rights
rights.description: Constitutional and statutory rights, explained in full.

judiciary.title: Judiciary
judiciary.description: Judges of the Supreme Court and the High Courts, with their biographies.

me.title: States
me.description: Every representative responsible for where you live.

me.mapHeading: Select a state or union territory
me.mapDescription: Click an area on the map to see who represents it.
me.noResults: No representatives have been ingested for {state} yet.

people.hierarchyHeading: How the Union Government is organised
people.hierarchyDescription: The Prime Minister and the Cabinet Ministers of the Union Council of Ministers, as currently constituted. Hover a point to see who holds it; click to open that person's page.
people.hierarchyEmpty: The government hierarchy has not been ingested yet.

record.reportError: Report an error in this record

translation.unreviewedExplanation: This page was machine-translated from English and has not yet been checked by a human reviewer. The English version is authoritative.

tts.unsupported: Your browser does not support reading this page aloud.

empty.heading: Nothing here yet
empty.body: This section is being built. Records appear only once they carry an official source.

footer.sourcing: Every explained fact in this directory links to an official government source. Records are updated in place; the date shown is when the record was last verified.
footer.notNews: This is a reference directory, not a news service.
footer.corrections: Found an error? Report it — no account needed.

error.notFoundBody: There is no record at this address.
